scope_note: Cert [491]: QA Witt Tower EEG Interictal Energy Return-Rank Anti-Persistence. Operator: log-energy-change bins b=floor(rank(log(E[t+1]/E[t]))*27/N), e_val=floor(rank(log(E[t+2]/E[t+1]))*27/N); signal a=b+2*e_val<=6 (A2 derived, raw); target=log(E[t+3]/E[t+2]). FINDING: ANTI-PERSISTENCE (structural inverse of rivers [490]). n_signal DEPLETED to 0.724x expected (rivers: 2.69x ELEVATED). Crash-reversion direction: pooled +13.632 log-% (p=0.020). All 6 recordings: lag-1 autocorr negative (-0.127 to -0.378). 5/6 n_signal below expected. Mechanism: EEG amplitude envelope modulates at ~10-20 sec period; consecutive 5-sec windows are ~half-period apart -> systematic anti-correlation. n_signal_ratio discrimination: rivers=2.69x (persistent), EEG=0.72x (anti-persistent), forex~1.0x (null). 6/6 PASS. Data: Siena Scalp EEG Database (LaCie); 6 patients PN01/03/05/06/07/09; 1-hour interictal segments. orbit_family on (b, e_val, m) Singularity-type pairs. Primary sources: Linkenkaer-Hansen (2001) doi:10.1523/JNEUROSCI.21-04-01370.2001; Stam (2005) doi:10.1016/j.clinph.2005.06.011. Parents: cert [490] (river contrast), cert [488] (equity contrast), cert [446] (Siena EEG).
